description: Three beam arrangements on identical steel-block cross-sections: pulse-echo (probe, down/back rays past a mid-wall flaw, A-scan inset with IP/flaw/back-wall spikes, ECHO TIME → DEPTH), through-transmission (TX top / aligned RX bottom, one-way beam, flaw shadow band onto receiver, received-amplitude bar dropping, LOSS ONLY), pitch-catch (two angled elements on the same top face, V path off the back wall into the receiver, SAME SIDE).
